mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM slaughter_records WHERE event_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(event_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM immunization_records WHERE event_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM animals GROUP BY status
SELECT pen_name AS penName, capacity, current_count AS currentCount FROM pens WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY pen_name
SELECT pen_name AS penName, capacity, current_count AS currentCount FROM pens WHERE status = 1 AND current_count >= capacity AND capacity > 0 ORDER BY pen_name

SELECT a.ear_tag AS earTag FROM animals a WHERE a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM immunization_records ir WHERE ir.ear_tag = a.ear_tag AND ir.event_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ) LIMIT 50
